fn_def_list.fn_code:
void do_help()
{
    printf("Usage : minizip [-o] [-a] [-0 to -9] [-p password] [-j] file.zip [files_to_add]

" \
           "  -o  Overwrite existing file.zip
" \
           "  -a  Append to existing file.zip
" \
           "  -0  Store only
" \
           "  -1  Compress faster
" \
           "  -9  Compress better

" \
           "  -j  exclude path. store only the file name.

");
}
